executives.name: Tom O'Leary
executives.background: Tom O’Leary was appointed Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer of Iluka Resources in September 2016. He has previously held senior executive roles at Wesfarmers, including Managing Director of Wesfarmers Chemicals, Energy & Fertilisers. He has a Bachelor of Laws and a Bachelor of Jurisprudence from the University of Western Australia and has completed the Advanced Management Program at Harvard Business School.

tenure_dates.title: Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Adele Stratton
executives.background: Adele Stratton was appointed Chief Financial Officer and Head of Development in September 2018. She joined Iluka in 2011 and has held various senior roles in finance and corporate development. She is a qualified Chartered Accountant and holds a Bachelor of Commerce from the University of Western Australia.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer and Head of Development

executives.name: Matthew Blackwell
executives.background: Matthew Blackwell joined Iluka in 2004 and has held various senior positions including Head of Marketing and Procurement. He was appointed Head of Major Projects and Engineering in 2019. He holds a Bachelor of Engineering and a Master of Business Administration.

tenure_dates.title: Head of Major Projects and Engineering

executives.name: Sarah Hodgson
executives.background: Sarah Hodgson was appointed Head of People and Sustainability in 2022. She has extensive experience in human resources and corporate affairs within the mining and resources sector.

executives.name: Daniel McGrath
executives.background: Daniel McGrath is the Head of Rare Earths. He has held several senior operational and technical roles since joining Iluka in 1993.

board_of_directors.name: Rob Cole
board_of_directors.background: Rob Cole was appointed to the Board in March 2018 and became Chairman in 2022. He has over 30 years’ experience in the energy and resources industry, including executive roles at Woodside Petroleum and Beach Energy. He is a former partner of the law firm King & Wood Mallesons.

board_of_directors.name: Tom O'Leary
board_of_directors.background: Managing Director and CEO. See executive profile for details.

board_of_directors.name: Marcelo Bastos
board_of_directors.background: Marcelo Bastos was appointed to the Board in February 2019. He is an experienced resources executive with over 30 years’ experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at BHP, Vale and MMG.

board_of_directors.name: Lynne Saint
board_of_directors.background: Lynne Saint was appointed to the Board in October 2019. She has over 30 years’ experience in financial, ethical and commercial roles, including as Chief Audit Executive at Bechtel Group.

board_of_directors.name: Susie Corlett
board_of_directors.background: Susie Corlett was appointed to the Board in June 2020. She is a geologist with over 25 years’ experience in exploration, mining operations and investment banking.

board_of_directors.name: Andrea Sutton
board_of_directors.background: Andrea Sutton was appointed to the Board in June 2021. She has over 25 years’ experience with Rio Tinto and Energy Resources of Australia, including roles in operations, strategy and corporate affairs.
